SEARCH
Package com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.repository

Class JobsRepository

java.lang.Object
com.krishcpatel.realm.jobs.repository.JobsRepository
public final class JobsRepository extends Object
Persistence layer for player jobs, progression, reward caps, and explorer progress.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    JobsRepository(DatabaseManager db)
    Creates the jobs repository.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Counts how many active jobs a player currently has.

    Returns the current daily cap usage for a reward rule.

  • Constructor Details

    • JobsRepository

      public JobsRepository(DatabaseManager db)
      Creates the jobs repository.
      Parameters:
      db - database manager

  • Method Details

    • initSchema

      public void initSchema() throws SQLException
      Creates the jobs schema if it does not already exist.
      Throws:
      SQLException - if schema creation fails

    • getJobs

      public List<PlayerJob> getJobs(String playerUuid) throws SQLException
      Returns all active jobs for a player in join order.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - player UUID as a string
      Returns:
      active jobs for the player
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the query fails

    • getJob

      public PlayerJob getJob(String playerUuid, String jobId) throws SQLException
      Returns a specific active job for a player.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - player UUID as a string
      jobId - normalized job identifier
      Returns:
      matching player job, or null if none exists
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the query fails

    • getJob

      public PlayerJob getJob(Connection c, String playerUuid, String jobId) throws SQLException
      Returns a specific active job for a player using an existing transaction connection.
      Parameters:
      c - active database connection
      playerUuid - player UUID as a string
      jobId - normalized job identifier
      Returns:
      matching player job, or null if none exists
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the query fails

    • countJobs

      public int countJobs(String playerUuid) throws SQLException
      Counts how many active jobs a player currently has.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - player UUID as a string
      Returns:
      number of active jobs
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the query fails

    • joinJob

      public boolean joinJob(String playerUuid, String jobId, long joinedAt, int startingLevel) throws SQLException
      Joins a player to a job and initializes progress in a local transaction.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - player UUID as a string
      jobId - normalized job identifier
      joinedAt - membership timestamp
      startingLevel - initial level row value
      Returns:
      true if the membership row was inserted
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the write fails

    • joinJob

      public boolean joinJob(Connection c, String playerUuid, String jobId, long joinedAt, int startingLevel) throws SQLException
      Joins a player to a job using an existing transaction connection.
      Parameters:
      c - active database connection
      playerUuid - player UUID as a string
      jobId - normalized job identifier
      joinedAt - membership timestamp
      startingLevel - initial level row value
      Returns:
      true if the membership row was inserted
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the write fails

    • ensureProgress

      public void ensureProgress(Connection c, String playerUuid, String jobId, int startingLevel) throws SQLException
      Ensures a progress row exists for a player's job.
      Parameters:
      c - active database connection
      playerUuid - player UUID as a string
      jobId - normalized job identifier
      startingLevel - initial level if a row must be created
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the write fails

    • leaveJob

      public boolean leaveJob(String playerUuid, String jobId) throws SQLException
      Removes a single job membership from a player.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - player UUID as a string
      jobId - normalized job identifier
      Returns:
      true if a membership row was removed
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the delete fails

    • leaveAllJobs

      public int leaveAllJobs(String playerUuid) throws SQLException
      Removes all job memberships from a player.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - player UUID as a string
      Returns:
      number of membership rows removed
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the delete fails

    • getCapState

      public JobCapState getCapState(String playerUuid, String jobId, String rewardKey, long dayKey) throws SQLException
      Returns the current daily cap usage for a reward rule.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - player UUID as a string
      jobId - normalized job identifier
      rewardKey - unique rule reward key
      dayKey - UTC epoch day
      Returns:
      current cap state, or JobCapState.EMPTY if none exists yet
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the query fails

    • getCapState

      public JobCapState getCapState(Connection c, String playerUuid, String jobId, String rewardKey, long dayKey) throws SQLException
      Returns the current daily cap usage for a reward rule.
      Parameters:
      c - active database connection
      playerUuid - player UUID as a string
      jobId - normalized job identifier
      rewardKey - unique rule reward key
      dayKey - UTC epoch day
      Returns:
      current cap state, or JobCapState.EMPTY if none exists yet
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the query fails

    • addCapEarnings

      public void addCapEarnings(Connection c, String playerUuid, String jobId, String rewardKey, long dayKey, long money, long xp) throws SQLException
      Adds earned amounts to a player's daily cap usage for a reward rule.
      Parameters:
      c - active database connection
      playerUuid - player UUID as a string
      jobId - normalized job identifier
      rewardKey - unique rule reward key
      dayKey - UTC epoch day
      money - money earned to add
      xp - xp earned to add
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the write fails

    • updateProgress

      public void updateProgress(Connection c, String playerUuid, String jobId, int level, long xp, long totalXp) throws SQLException
      Updates a player's stored level and xp totals for a job.
      Parameters:
      c - active database connection
      playerUuid - player UUID as a string
      jobId - normalized job identifier
      level - new level
      xp - current xp toward the next level
      totalXp - lifetime xp total
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the update fails

    • markChunkExplored

      public boolean markChunkExplored(Connection c, String playerUuid, String jobId, String world, int chunkX, int chunkZ, long visitedAt) throws SQLException
      Marks a chunk as explored for a player's job, returning whether it was a first visit.
      Parameters:
      c - active database connection
      playerUuid - player UUID as a string
      jobId - normalized job identifier
      world - world name
      chunkX - chunk x coordinate
      chunkZ - chunk z coordinate
      visitedAt - first-visit timestamp
      Returns:
      true if the row was inserted for the first time
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the write fails

    • markGlobalBossPayoutClaimed

      public boolean markGlobalBossPayoutClaimed(Connection c, String playerUuid, String bossType, long dayKey, long claimedAt) throws SQLException
      Marks a global boss payout as claimed for a player/day combination.
      Parameters:
      c - active database connection
      playerUuid - player UUID as a string
      bossType - normalized boss type key
      dayKey - UTC epoch day
      claimedAt - claim timestamp
      Returns:
      true if this is the first claim for that player/boss/day
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the write fails

    • markPlacedBlockGuard

      public void markPlacedBlockGuard(String world, int x, int y, int z, String playerUuid, String material, long placedAt) throws SQLException
      Persists a placed block guard so the block cannot later be farmed for break rewards.
      Parameters:
      world - world name
      x - block x
      y - block y
      z - block z
      playerUuid - player who placed the block
      material - material name
      placedAt - placement timestamp
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the write fails

    • hasPlacedBlockGuard

      public boolean hasPlacedBlockGuard(String world, int x, int y, int z) throws SQLException
      Returns whether a placed-block anti-farm guard exists for the location.

      This is used on block break to suppress rewards for player-placed blocks. Callers may clear the guard afterward once all interested subsystems have observed it.

      Parameters:
      world - world name
      x - block x
      y - block y
      z - block z
      Returns:
      true if the block was known to be player-placed
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the query fails

    • deletePlacedBlockGuard

      public boolean deletePlacedBlockGuard(String world, int x, int y, int z) throws SQLException
      Deletes a placed-block anti-farm guard if one exists for the location.
      Parameters:
      world - world name
      x - block x
      y - block y
      z - block z
      Returns:
      true if a guard row was deleted
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the delete fails

    • purgePlacedBlockGuardsOlderThan

      public int purgePlacedBlockGuardsOlderThan(long cutoffMillis) throws SQLException
      Purges stale placed-block guard rows older than the provided cutoff.
      Parameters:
      cutoffMillis - epoch millis cutoff (rows older than this are deleted)
      Returns:
      deleted row count
      Throws:
      SQLException - if the delete fails
